Name: Commander
Effect: If there is an Allied Dondozo on the field, increase its Attributes and Defenses by 2. Dondozo is blocked for the rest of the scene. All damage that would be dealt to this Pokemon is dealt to Dodonzo instead. Unique Ability.
Description: The Pokemon has a strategic mind, even if its body is frail it can devise clever plans and tell its Dondozo friend exactly what to do.
